column4: QCR ID: 338086 | Seismic Equipment Supplied for Non-Seismic Job
column5: The seismic parameters for this job are non-seismic, and XLR8 provided seismic equipment.  The hoistway was built per approved drawings (non seismic, 8’-6” wide). The seismic parameters were confirmed before final, which are non-seismic (see below); however, XLR8 is indicating seismic, and seismic equipment was provided meant to fit in a 8’8” wide hoistway.  Confirmed by Kevin Menaker, email attached.  We need all materials to change this job to non-Seismic, such as rails, brackets, machine plate, fishplate hardware, etc.  Will also need updated drawings.
